review: this book is about a young adult named bambina (bambi for short). five stars are indicated simply to keep from judging the story wrongly since i have not yet read it.  

the review is positive. the reviewer mentions that they thought they were getting the story of the deer but it is actually about a young adult named bambina. they give the book five stars and say they will read it again when they are older. the reviewer also mentions that the characters were enthralling and the book is the embodiment of all great reads. the review is positive and the reviewer is satisfied with the book.
